key.easyrepair.inventory_open.descriptio: Open the inventory of the pouch
message.easyrepair.pouch_empty: Repair failed. Please check that it contains the correct repair material for the tool you're using.
message.easyrepair.repair_material_empty: The repair material for the tool you're using has been used up. Please check your pouches.
tooltip.easyrepair.feature_description: Store repair items in this pouch and keep it in your inventory. When a tool breaks, it will be automatically repaired using the items stored inside the pouch.
tooltip.easyrepair.size_description: This pouch can store up to %1$d stacks of repair items.
